2026-04-25.headline: One headline a day, the rest can wait.
2026-04-25.summary: This is the only story you will see today. The cure for endless scrolling is a list of length one. Come back tomorrow for the next one.

2026-04-24.headline: Slow news is good news.
2026-04-24.summary: Most headlines age out within hours. A single, considered story per day keeps you informed without burning the afternoon.

2026-04-23.headline: Welcome to One News.
2026-04-23.summary: One top story per day. No infinite feed, no notifications, no scrolling. Edit news.json to add the next day's entry.
